docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TAYLOR, DOMINIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSHI, ANU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR, MAILED TO THE WRONG ADDRESS. RE-MAILED TO THE CORRECTED ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, DOMINIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOSHI, ANU STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
